email_text: Hi John, just confirming our 2pm meeting tomorrow. See you then! - Alice
Team, attached is the Q3 sales report. Please review by EOD. Thanks, Sarah
Dear customer, your subscription will renew on 15th. Questions? Reply here. Best, Acme Billing
Hello valued member, new webinar invite attached. Register today! Regards, Events Team
Hi everyone, office closed Monday for holiday. Enjoy! - HR
John, invoice #INV-1234 attached for your records. Paid? Let me know. - Accounting
Team meeting notes from yesterday attached. Action items assigned. - Project Lead
Dear John Smith, welcome to our newsletter. Unsubscribe link at bottom. Cheers!
Hi Sarah, can you approve this expense report by noon? Link: approvallink.com - Finance
Hello colleagues, new policy document attached. Please acknowledge receipt. - Compliance
Reminder: Password policy update training mandatory by Friday. Link in Slack. - IT
Dear member, your loyalty points expire soon. Redeem here: points.acme.com - Rewards
Hi team, updated project timeline attached. Review and comment. - PM
Customer service notice: Maintenance scheduled Saturday 2am-6am. Sorry for inconvenience.
Hi David, contract renewal discussion notes attached. Call to schedule? - Legal
Hello, shipment #SH123 tracking updated. Expected delivery Tue. - Logistics
Team, quarterly goals meeting rescheduled to Thursday 10am. Zoom link follows.
Dear subscriber, new content recommendations based on your reads. Enjoy!
Hi Lisa, performance review scheduled Wed 3pm. Prep materials? - Manager
Invoice reminder: Payment #4567 due Friday. Portal: billing.acme.com - Accounts
Welcome onboard! Orientation schedule attached. HR contact if questions.
Hi Mark, vendor contract review needed by EOD. Doc attached. - Procurement
System maintenance notice: All services down 1hr Sat night. Plan accordingly.
Dear user, feedback survey - 2 mins. Help us improve! Link: survey.acme.com
Hello team, budget approval meeting canceled. Reschedule next week.
Hi Rachel, expense approval pending your signoff. Portal link sent.
Customer update: New feature rollout next week. Details attached.
Team, org chart update effective immediately. Attached for reference.
Dear colleague, diversity training registration open. Deadline end of month.
Hi everyone, happy holidays! Office closed 24th-26th. Enjoy break!
Invoice #789 attached for approval. Questions? Reply all. - Finance
